     the Fermi energy is     2.8213 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.82786327 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.1E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27197100 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8183.55589227 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -204004.29238993 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  102894.97799065 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3151.93582237 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   96079.64601470 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.95168532 Ry

     total magnetization       =    33.41 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    36.38 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  61 iterations
